title: Unsere Welt erkunden — Exploring our world
subject: German
description:
In Unit 2, students move beyond their personal world to how they engage with the wider world.
They do this by exploring options for personal travel and exploration in German-speaking
communities and Australia, and by considering the associated cultural conventions. Students
consider the ways that German culture has contributed to the world, and reflect upon their
experiences, compare options and express preferences, while appreciating diverse cultural
values.
Unit objectives
1. Comprehend German to understand information, ideas, opinions and experiences related to
travel and exploration, social customs and German influences around the world.
2. Identify tone, purpose, context and audience to infer meaning related to travel and
exploration, social customs and German influences around the world.
3. Analyse and evaluate information and ideas to draw conclusions related to travel and
exploration, social customs and German influences around the world.
4. Apply knowledge of language elements of German to construct meaning related to travel and
exploration, social customs and German influences around the world.
5. Structure, sequence and synthesise information to justify opinions and perspectives related
to travel and exploration, social customs and German influences around the world.
6. Communicate using contextually appropriate German related to travel and exploration, social
customs and German influences around the world.
German 2025 v1.3 Units
